movie.actors: Chris Pratt, Bryce Dallas Howard, Irrfan Khan, Vincent D'Onofrio
movie.plot: A new theme park, built on the original site of Jurassic Park, creates a genetically modified hybrid dinosaur, the Indominus Rex, which escapes containment and goes on a killing spree.
movie.title: Jurassic World
movie.writer: Rick Jaffa (screenplay by), Amanda Silver (screenplay by), Colin Trevorrow (screenplay by), Derek Connolly (screenplay by), Rick Jaffa (story by), Amanda Silver (story by), Michael Crichton (based on the characters created by)
